title: neurogramma muelleri
intro: Neurogramma muelleri, also known as "Australian fern", is a rare and unique species of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, a group of vascular plants commonly referred to as ferns. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Neurogramma muelleri include its potential to aid in wound healing and its use as an anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Neurogramma muelleri is typically prepared for herbal use through drying and processing into capsules, tinctures, or teas, allowing for a variety of applications in traditional medicine.
